name: git_branch
description: Manages and lists Git branches with rich metadata. Supports listing local, remote, and merged branches; creating, deleting, renaming, and force-deleting branches. Parses verbose branch output into structured branch objects with upstream tracking, ahead/behind counts, and detached HEAD detection.

dependencies.name: nunjucks
dependencies.note: Nunjucks template engine is required for argument rendering.

path.description: Path to the Git repository or a subdirectory within it.

action.description: Branch action to perform. 'list' returns branch metadata. 'create', 'delete', 'rename', and 'force_delete' mutate the repository.

branch_name.description: Name of the branch to create, delete, rename, or force-delete.

new_branch_name.description: New name for the branch when action is 'rename'.

start_point.description: Commit hash, tag, or branch name to start the new branch from when action is 'create'. Defaults to HEAD.

all.description: List all branches, including remote-tracking branches. Adds -a flag.

remote.description: List only remote-tracking branches. Adds -r flag.

merged.description: List branches merged into the given commit. Passes --merged <commit>.

no_merged.description: List branches not merged into the given commit. Passes --no-merged <commit>.

format.description: Output format for list action. 'verbose' uses -vv for upstream tracking. 'plain' uses -v.

max_results.description: Maximum number of branches to return. Enforced in the normalization pipeline.

current_branch.description: Name of the currently checked-out branch, or null in detached HEAD state.

branches.description: Array of branch objects with rich metadata.

name.description: Branch name, or detached HEAD identifier.

current.description: True when this branch is the current HEAD.

remote.description: Tracked upstream branch (e.g. origin/main). Null if no upstream is set.

commit.description: Short commit hash at the tip of the branch.

subject.description: Subject line of the tip commit.

ahead.description: Number of commits ahead of upstream. Omitted when zero.

behind.description: Number of commits behind upstream. Omitted when zero.

merged.description: Whether the branch is considered merged. Only present when --merged or --no-merged filter was applied.

total_branches.description: Total number of branches in the branches array.

truncated.description: True if the result was truncated due to max_results.

created.description: Name of the branch created. Present only for create action.

deleted.description: Name of the branch deleted. Present only for delete and force_delete actions.

renamed_from.description: Original branch name. Present only for rename action.

renamed_to.description: New branch name. Present only for rename action.

args: {% if action == 'list' %}{% if format == 'verbose' %}-vv{% else %}-v{% endif %}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'list' and merged %}{{ merged }}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'list' and no_merged %}{{ no_merged }}{% endif %}
{% if action != 'list' and branch_name %}{{ branch_name }}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'rename' and new_branch_name %}{{ new_branch_name }}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'create' and start_point %}{{ start_point }}{% endif %}

pipeline.description: Parse git branch -vv output into structured branch objects. Detects current branch, detached HEAD, remote-tracking branches, upstream tracking info, ahead/behind counts, and commit metadata.
Enforce max_results cap on the branches array. Sets truncated flag if branches are capped.
Build final envelope with branches array, current_branch, total_branches, and action-specific fields (created, deleted, renamed_from, renamed_to).

compatible_downstream.description: Pass branch names to git_log for commit history retrieval.
Pass branch names to git_diff for branch comparison and range diffs.
Check working tree status of the current branch.

compatible_upstream.description: Receive a repository path from directory_list to scope the branch query.
